mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYSTEM_LOG ( /* LOG_ID는 DB가 자동으로 넣어주므로 제외합니다 */ LOG_LEVEL, METHOD_NAME, REQUEST_URI, HTTP_METHOD, EXECUTION_TIME, PARAMETER_DATA, ERROR_MSG, ACCESS_IP, LOGIN_ID, LOG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{logLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{methodName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestUri, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{httpMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{executionTime, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{parameterData, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{errorMsg, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{accessIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
